name: Zoho CRM
description: Zoho CRM connector for contacts, leads, accounts, and deals

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: From Zoho API Console → Your Client → Client ID

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: From Zoho API Console → Your Client → Client Secret

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Must match one of the Authorized Redirect URIs in your Zoho client app.

install_fields.label: Data Center (com/eu/in/com.au)
install_fields.help: Zoho data center suffix: com (US, default), eu (Europe), in (India), com.au (Australia).

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client credentials and access token by calling GET /org.

methods.name: Get Authorization URL
methods.description: Return the Zoho OAuth2 authorization URL for the configured data center.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping Zoho CRM via GET /org and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync CRM Records
methods.description: Full paginated sync of Leads, Contacts, Accounts, and Deals.

methods.name: List Records (Generic)
methods.description: List records from any Zoho CRM module with pagination.

methods.name: Get Record (Generic)
methods.description: Fetch a single Zoho CRM record by module and record ID.

methods.name: Search Records
methods.description: Search records in a module using Zoho CRM criteria syntax.
